'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=kUWBLO53jcFl5a59Yrdv_L2ES69mA6.jBBY.HgiRwjk-1776278738-1.0.1.1-R9bY7yduN5__XJpWs8kOZeRcI9OFcl2Ao_Y2TD.3w.Q"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
